### Post by knils00717 on 2010-11-20
i m tryin to set up dns server in my lapi but m getting sm errs
i installed bind9

sudo vim /etc/network/interfaces 
auto lo
iface lo inet loopback
#aut0 eth0
#iface eth0 inet static
#address 192.168.5.1
#netmask 255.255.255.0
#gateway 192.168.5.50

sudo /etc/resolv.conf
# Generated by NetworkManager
search india.com
nameserver 192.168.5.1
nameserver 218.248.240.181
~                                                                               
~                                    
sudo vim /etc/bind/named.conf.local
//include "/etc/bind/zones.rfc1918";
# This is the zone definition. replace example.com with your domain name

zone “india.com” {
type master;
file “/etc/bind/db.india.com”;
};

# This is the zone definition for reverse DNS. replace 0.168.192 with your network address in reverse notation - e.g my network address is 192.168.0

zone “5.168.192.in-addr.arpa” {
type master;
file “/etc/bind/db.192”;
};
~                                

sudo vim db.india.com
; BIND data file for local loopback interface
;
$TTL    604800
@       IN      SOA     india.com. admin.india.com. (
                              2         ; Serial
                         604800         ; Refresh
                          86400         ; Retry
                        2419200         ; Expire
                         604800 )       ; Negative Cache TTL
;
@          IN      NS      india.com.
@          IN      A       192.168.5.1
india.com  IN      A       192.168.5.1
~                                                                               
~                                                                               
~                                             

sudo invoke-rc.d bind9 restart
 * Stopping domain name service... bind9                                        rndc: connect failed: 127.0.0.1#953: connection refused
                                                                         [ OK ]
 * Starting domain name service... bind9                                 [fail] 
invoke-rc.d: initscript bind9, action "restart" failed.

### Post by knils00717 on 2010-11-20
knils@server:/etc/bind$ sudo vim db.192
; BIND reverse data file for local loopback interface
;
$TTL    604800
@       IN      SOA     india.com. admin.india.com. (
                              2         ; Serial
                         604800         ; Refresh
                          86400         ; Retry
                        2419200         ; Expire
                         604800 )       ; Negative Cache TTL
;
@          IN    NS      india.com.
@          IN    PTR     india.com.
india.com  IN    A       192.168.5.1


~                                                                               
~
